fairValue.label: DEEP_EXPENSIVE
confidenceReasons: Peer set quality is medium — few clean pure-play peers, curated snapshots rather than live pipeline data, conglomerate adjustments required
Current margins are 2.7x the historical average — extreme cycle peak increases valuation uncertainty
Fair value range is wide (226% of midpoint) — methods produce divergent estimates
Primary methods (DCF vs reverse DCF) disagree by 98% — normalised economics vs market-implied economics diverge significantly
Only 5 years of history available — minimum for cyclical normalization
